top_signals.title: UK government split over new ‘golden visa’ scheme to woo super-rich
top_signals.summary: Anti-corruption campaigners sound the alarm after previous programme was scrapped owing to dirty money
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Turkey launches security crackdown ahead of Nato summit
top_signals.summary: Activists have been arrested, journalist accreditations denied and public assemblies banned before July meeting
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mistrust between the Treasury and MoD is holding back UK defence
top_signals.summary: Resolving the impasse between the two departments is urgent
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Extreme heat elevates national security risk at London climate week
top_signals.summary: Focus shifts to physical dangers as well as energy security as temperatures break fresh records

top_signals.title: Indian snack giant Haldiram’s cooks up European expansion
top_signals.summary: Temasek-backed company opens first UK restaurant in London’s Leicester Square

top_signals.title: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 AI model cleared by U.S. for wider use
top_signals.summary: The clearance eases a confrontation that erupted two weeks ago when the government abruptly barred Anthropic from giving foreign nationals access to Mythos 5 and a related model.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
